zh.lifeSummary: Guy de Montlhéry I是Milton de Monthléry seigneur de Montlhéry et de Bray-sur-Seine的兒子，於1009年出生在法國瑟-吉瓦蒙特爾賀利。他和Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte至少有3個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1095年7月24日在他的家鄉享年86歲，埋葬在法國瑟-吉瓦隆朋吉素爾-爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Guy de Montlhéry I是Milton de Monthléry seigneur de Montlhéry et de Bray-sur-Seine的儿子，于1009年出生在法国瑟-吉瓦蒙特爾賀利。他和Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte至少有3个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1095年7月24日在他的家乡享年86岁，埋葬在法国瑟-吉瓦隆朋吉素爾-爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: Guy de Montlhéry I was born in 1009, in Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, France as the son of Milton de Monthléry seigneur de Montlhéry et de Bray-sur-Seine. He had at least 3 sons and 6 daughters with Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte. He died on 24 July 1095, in his hometown, at the age of 86, and was buried in Longpont-sur-Orge, Seine-et-Oise, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Guy de Montlhéry I est né en 1009, à Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, France, fils de Milton de Monthléry seigneur de Montlhéry et de Bray-sur-Seine. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles avec Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte. Il est décédé le 24 juillet 1095, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Longpont-sur-Orge, Seine-et-Oise, France.

de.lifeSummary: Guy de Montlhéry I wurde 1009 in Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, Frankreich, als Sohn von Milton de Monthléry seigneur de Montlhéry et de Bray-sur-Seine geboren. Er hatte mit Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Juli 1095 im Alter von 86 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Longpont-sur-Orge, Seine-et-Oise, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Guy de Montlhéry I è nato il nel 1009 nel Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, Francia come figlio di Milton de Monthléry seigneur de Montlhéry et de Bray-sur-Seine. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie con Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte. Morì il 24 luglio 1095, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a Longpont-sur-Orge, Seine-et-Oise, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy de Montlhéry Iは1009年にフランスセアイネ-エト-オイゼモントルheリーでMilton de Monthléry seigneur de Montlhéry et de Bray-sur-Seineの息子として生まれた。彼はHodierna de Gometz-La-Ferteとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1095年7月24日に故郷で86歳で死去し，フランスセアイネ-エト-オイゼロングプオント-スル-オルッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy de Montlhéry I(은)는 1009년 프랑스 세이인-트-이스 몽he리에서 Milton de Monthléry seigneur de Montlhéry et de Bray-sur-Seine의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1095년 7월 24일 그의 고향에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세이인-트-이스 론그폰트-수-르지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Guy de Montlhéry I nasceu em 1009, em Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, França filho de Milton de Monthléry seigneur de Montlhéry et de Bray-sur-Seine. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas com Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte. Ele faleceu em 24 de julho de 1095, em sua cidade natal, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Longpont-sur-Orge, Seine-et-Oise, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Guy de Montlhéry I родился в 1009 г. в местности монтлхeри, сине-ет-оис, Франция. Его отца звали Milton de Monthléry seigneur de Montlhéry et de Bray-sur-Seine. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей от Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte. Он умер 24 июля 1095 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности лонгпонт-сур-ордж, сине-ет-оис, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Guy de Montlhéry I nació en 1009, en Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, Francia como hijo de Milton de Monthléry seigneur de Montlhéry et de Bray-sur-Seine. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas con Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte. Murió el 24 de julio de 1095, en su pueblo, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Longpont-sur-Orge, Seine-et-Oise, Francia.
